zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wychingham於1416年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，她的父親Sir Edward Witchingham41歲，母親Mrs Edward Witchingham37歲。她於1448年與John Astley Esq.在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延普拉瑟享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wychingham was born in 1416, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Edward Witchingham, was 41 and her mother, Mrs Edward Witchingham, was 37. She married John Astley Esq. in 1448, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1475, in Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 59.

Elle a épousé John Astley Esq. en 1448, à Melton Constable, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1475, à Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 플라ce
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wychingham(이)가 1416년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Witchingham(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Edward Witchingham(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 노르폴크 멜턴 콘스타블일에서 John Astley Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 플라ce에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: плакe, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wychingham родилась в 1416 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Witchingham было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Edward Witchingham, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Astley Esq. в 1448 г. в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности плакe, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.
